info.title: Tempera Control Plane API
info.description: Account, auth, billing, credential, connector, and entitlement API owned by the ecosystem control plane.

get.summary: Liveness probe for the control plane.

deployment_organization_id.description: Pinned organization id, present only in single_tenant / pinned vpc deployments.

get.summary: Readiness probe for durable control-plane storage.

deployment_organization_id.description: Pinned organization id, present only in single_tenant / pinned vpc deployments.

get.summary: Return the current authenticated principal and active workspace context.

parameters.name: X-Tempera-Reference-Request-Id
parameters.description: Platform-staff-only reference-load marker. When a platform staff principal supplies this header, it must be a UUID and the serving runtime must have complete source, machine, and image provenance.

X-Tempera-Reference-Request-Id.description: Staff-only reference-load echo when the request supplies a reference request identity.

X-Tempera-Source-Commit.description: Staff-only serving source SHA for a reference-load request.

X-Tempera-Machine-Id.description: Staff-only serving machine identity for a reference-load request.

X-Tempera-Image-Ref-Sha256.description: Staff-only SHA-256 of the serving immutable image reference.

400.description: A platform staff principal supplied an invalid X-Tempera-Reference-Request-Id header.

503.description: A platform staff reference-load request cannot be served because runtime source, machine, or image provenance is incomplete.

get.summary: List organizations/workspaces visible to the current user.

post.summary: Create an organization/workspace.

403.description: Operation is not permitted by the active deployment topology (e.g. creating additional organizations in a single-tenant deployment)

get.summary: List active account-console sessions for the current user.

post.summary: Create a first-party hosted account session from email/password login or signup.
post.description: The returned token pair is for the control-plane account console. Product access still requires OAuth grants or scoped API keys.

delete.summary: Revoke an account-console session and its refresh token. Revoking an unknown session id is a no-op.

403.description: Session belongs to a different user

post.summary: Select the active organization, project, and environment for the account console.
post.description: Returns a new control-plane audience token pair with the selected workspace claims. The public site stores it in HttpOnly session cookies.

200.description: Control-plane audience session token pair for the selected workspace

403.description: Request failed.

get.summary: List team members for the active organization.

delete.summary: Remove a team member from the active organization.

get.summary: List organization invites.

post.summary: Invite a teammate to the active organization.

get.summary: List projects for the active organization.

post.summary: Create a project in the active organization.

get.summary: List environments for the active project.

post.summary: Create an environment in a project owned by the active organization.

get.summary: List scoped API keys for the active workspace. Plaintext key material is never returned.

post.summary: Create a scoped API key. Plaintext key material is returned once.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

delete.summary: Revoke a scoped API key. Revoking an unknown key id is a no-op.

204.description: API key revoked or already absent

post.summary: Rotate a scoped API key. New plaintext key material is returned once.

get.summary: List provider connection metadata using a first-party account session. Secret references and values are never returned.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Create a tenant-scoped provider connection using only an external secret reference.

201.description: Provider connection created without exposing its secret reference

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

409.description: A connection already uses the requested name in this workspace

delete.summary: Revoke a provider connection immediately. Revoking an unknown id is a no-op.

204.description: Provider connection revoked or already absent

post.summary: Replace a connection secret reference and increment its revision without exposing the reference.
Resolve connection runtime metadata for a tenant-bound tempera-llm service credential.

200.description: Runtime-only connection metadata including the external secret reference

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

get.summary: List external experiment-provider metadata. Secret references and values are never returned.

post.summary: Register a tenant-scoped experiment provider using only an external secret reference.

delete.summary: Revoke an experiment-provider connection. An unknown id is a no-op.

post.summary: Atomically consume an exact human approval and resolve a provider reference for tempera-workflows.

200.description: Approved runtime metadata, including the external secret reference

get.summary: List versioned public Ed25519 verifier keys for an authorized human administrator.

post.summary: Register or rotate a public Ed25519 verifier key. Private key material is rejected.

delete.summary: Revoke a public verifier key while retaining its history.

get.summary: List exact, single-use experiment approvals for an authorized human approver.

post.summary: Create a short-lived human approval bound to exact proposal, protocol, provider, and MCP preparation digests.

delete.summary: Revoke an unused experiment approval. Consumed approvals remain immutable.

204.description: Approval revoked, immutable, or already absent

get.summary: List recent scoped account and security activity for the active user and organization.
List supported hosted connectors and their setup metadata.
Return connection status for one connector.
List registered Tempera products and their setup metadata.
Return entitlement and first-mile setup status for one product.
Return billing plan, usage, entitlement, customer, and invoice state for owner, admin, or billing users.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

get.summary: Create a Stripe checkout, fiat invoice, or crypto settlement handoff URL.

parameters.name: rail
parameters.description: Payment rail or accepted alias. Defaults to stripe.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Billing plan identifier alias used by SDK clients.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Billing interval for the selected plan.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Settlement currency for the selected rail.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Blockchain network for crypto settlement rails.

400.description: Unsupported payment rail, plan, currency, or network

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

501.description: The requested feature is disabled because it is not explicitly configured for this deployment (e.g. billing rails in a vpc deployment with no in-network URLs)

get.summary: Create a customer billing portal handoff URL.

501.description: The requested feature is disabled because it is not explicitly configured for this deployment (e.g. billing rails in a vpc deployment with no in-network URLs)

get.summary: Return the org credit wallet balance, grant, overage, and recent ledger for owner, admin, or billing users. Internal cost/margin fields are redacted from the ledger for non-staff callers and returned in full only to platform staff.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Receive a signed Stripe webhook and reconcile subscription, invoice, and entitlement state.

get.summary: List the entitled Tempera Code model catalog. Requires model:read.

402.description: Model access is not entitled for the workspace

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Report a billable usage event and receive the current entitlement decision.

409.description: Idempotency key was already accepted with a different payload

post.summary: Atomically reserve the maximum model cost before starting a provider request.

201.description: Maximum model cost admitted and reserved

402.description: Entitlement, plan, or credit budget rejected admission

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

409.description: Idempotency key was already used for different admission parameters

post.summary: Commit exact provider usage against an admitted reservation and release unused capacity.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

409.description: Reservation state or exact usage conflicts with a prior commit or release

post.summary: Release unused capacity after provider failure or cancellation.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Hold maximum capacity and record non-secret evidence when exact provider usage is unavailable.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

409.description: Reservation state, config identity, or prior reconciliation evidence conflicts

get.summary: List connected OAuth app grants for the active workspace.

delete.summary: Revoke an OAuth app grant and its refresh tokens.

get.summary: Validate an OAuth authorization request with PKCE and redirect to the hosted consent page.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Registered resource audience or resource URL. Defaults to the client's default audience.

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Alias for resource accepted by SDK clients.

302.description: Redirect to the hosted consent page with the validated authorization parameters

400.description: Unregistered client, redirect_uri, audience, or unsupported PKCE parameters

post.summary: Start or approve an OAuth authorization request with PKCE.

302.description: Redirect to the registered callback with code or error

post.summary: Exchange authorization code or refresh token for scoped access tokens.
Revoke an OAuth access or refresh token.
Validate a central access token or hosted API key for resource servers.
Unified Tempera MCP gateway. Accepts one stateless JSON-RPC 2.0 message per request.
post.description: Requires a bearer token minted for the tempera-mcp audience with the mcp:invoke scope. Auth Hub validates the caller and transparently proxies the request to the private Rust capability fabric; discovery and execution use the fabric's fixed tempera_* tools rather than product-namespaced tools. Notifications and protocol responses are produced by the fabric. Non-POST requests are rejected with 405.

202.description: JSON-RPC notification accepted with no response body

401.description: Bearer token is missing, invalid, or revoked

WWW-Authenticate.description: Bearer challenge with a resource_metadata pointer to the tempera-mcp protected resource metadata.

403.description: Token audience is not tempera-mcp or the mcp:invoke scope is missing

WWW-Authenticate.description: Bearer challenge with error="insufficient_scope" and a resource_metadata pointer.

405.description: The MCP gateway is stateless and only accepts POST

get.summary: OAuth authorization server discovery metadata.
OAuth protected resource discovery metadata for MCP/resource clients.
OAuth protected resource discovery metadata for one registered resource audience.

200.description: Protected resource metadata for the requested audience

get.summary: JSON Web Key Set for validating central issuer JWTs.
Return fail-closed source, machine, and image provenance for the serving runtime to a platform-staff account session.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Re-authenticate a platform-staff account session to mint a short-lived step-up elevation required for sensitive admin mutations.

403.description: Request failed.

post.summary: Platform-staff credit grant/adjustment to an org wallet. Requires a fresh step-up elevation; idempotent on the reference.

403.description: Platform staff or a fresh step-up is required

get.summary: Platform-staff internal billing view: per-org wallet balances plus provider cost, customer charge, and margin economics.

403.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

post.summary: Receive a Coinbase Commerce webhook and, on a signed confirmed/resolved charge, fund the org credit wallet. Replays are deduplicated by charge id.

parameters.name: x-cc-webhook-signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of the raw body using the shared webhook secret.

400.description: Webhook payload is not valid JSON

post.summary: Receive a PayPal webhook and, on a signature-verified PAYMENT.CAPTURE.COMPLETED, fund the org credit wallet.

400.description: Webhook payload is not valid JSON

post.summary: Create a one-time CSRF-bound GitHub App installation session.

201.description: GitHub installation URL and one-time setup state.

501.description: The requested feature is disabled because it is not explicitly configured for this deployment (e.g. billing rails in a vpc deployment with no in-network URLs)

get.summary: Bind a GitHub installation callback to its authenticated workspace.
List active GitHub App installations for the organization.

delete.summary: Disconnect a GitHub App installation from the workspace.

get.summary: List repository metadata received for a GitHub installation.

post.summary: Capture an ephemeral, immutable GitHub repository snapshot for an authorized workspace.

200.description: Base64-encoded archive and immutable commit provenance. Installation credentials are never returned.

501.description: The requested feature is disabled because it is not explicitly configured for this deployment (e.g. billing rails in a vpc deployment with no in-network URLs)

post.summary: Accept a signed, replay-deduplicated GitHub webhook.

AipError.description: The resource request failed with an AIP-193 Google JSON error

MissingScope.description: Token or API key is missing a required scope

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with immutable or already-consumed state

Gone.description: The referenced approval, key, or connection is expired or revoked

WrongWorkspace.description: Requested organization, project, or environment is not accessible to the current user

DeploymentForbidden.description: Operation is not permitted by the active deployment topology (e.g. creating additional organizations in a single-tenant deployment)

NotConfigured.description: The requested feature is disabled because it is not explicitly configured for this deployment (e.g. billing rails in a vpc deployment with no in-network URLs)

ApiKeyScope.description: A service-principal scope. Human-only review:resolve, review:gold:manage, training:publish, bio:experiment:approve, and bio:signer:manage are intentionally excluded.

client_id.description: Public OAuth client id that obtained the product token.

azp.description: Authorized-party alias for client_id on product OAuth tokens.

grant_id.description: Revocable OAuth grant backing the product token.

sid.description: Account-session id claim. Present on control-plane audience browser/account tokens and omitted from product OAuth tokens.

mode.description: Any value other than signup is treated as login.

inviteToken.description: One-time invite token from an invite accept link. Joins the inviting organization on login or signup.

acceptUrl.description: Invite acceptance link containing the one-time invite token. Only returned when the invite is created.

audience.description: Resource audience the key is minted for. Defaults to palette.

ProviderConnectionSecretRef.description: Reference to externally managed secret material. This is not a provider credential value.

usageDelegation.description: Short-lived Auth-signed caller delegation returned by token introspection and bound to this workspace.

Ed25519PublicJwk.description: Public Ed25519 key only. Private JWK members are forbidden.

metadata.description: Public, non-secret audit metadata suitable for the account console.

upstreamModel.description: Concrete provider model id. Present only for concrete catalog entries.

targetModel.description: Concrete model id resolved by an alias.

routingKey.description: Opaque gateway routing key; it is not an upstream credential.

providerCostMicros.description: Exact micro-USD charged by the provider for this request.

credentialId.description: Introspected access-token jti or API-key id; null only for explicit static/anonymous development modes.

expiresAt.description: Unix expiry checked by the gateway; required for access-token subjects.

delegation.description: Short-lived Auth-signed usage delegation. Required whenever subject is supplied; validated and never persisted.

UsageSubjectIdentity.description: Original caller identity cryptographically delegated by Auth token introspection. The reservation's internal actor_id/api_key_id independently preserve the reporting credential.

subject.description: Signed original-caller identity. Omission records the authenticated reporting credential itself and cannot assert a different actor.

configId.description: Immutable provider adapter/config identity; never a secret value.

maximumProviderCostMicros.description: Maximum provider cost calculated by tempera-llm for the admitted request.

expectedCost.description: Required only for settlement_pending; binds the later commit to these exact counters and provider cost.

idempotencyKey.description: Stable caller-provided event identity. Required for workflow_runs reports (from the tempera-workflows engine and the legacy Tempera Code path), for Tempera Code model usage, and for all cost-bearing events; retries with the same payload are deduplicated durably.

cost.description: Present on cost-bearing legacy events during the reservation migration window.

credit.description: Present when the event debited credits.

wallet.description: Wallet state after a cost-bearing event.

billableMicros.description: Credit micro-USD debited from the wallet for this event.

multiplierMillis.description: Applied margin in milli-units (1200 metered, 200 BYOK surcharge).

grantedMicros.description: Credits granted this period; null for unlimited (enterprise).

balanceMicros.description: Remaining credits; null for unlimited plans.

overageMicros.description: Credits consumed past zero on overage-enabled plans, invoiced via Stripe.

multiplierMillis.description: Staff-only. Present only for platform-staff callers.

CreditBalance.description: Org credit wallet. Redacted for non-staff callers (owner/admin/billing): the ledger entries omit provider_cost_micros/multiplier_millis/byok and the top-level multiplier_millis is absent. Platform staff receive the unredacted ledger rows and the top-level multiplier_millis.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier. Required for the authorization_code grant and must match the authorization code.

resource.description: Registered resource audience or resource URL. Must match the audience approved at authorization time.

audience.description: Alias for resource accepted by SDK clients.

usage_delegation.description: For complete model-gateway identities only: an Auth-signed, workspace-bound delegation valid for at most 60 seconds.

deployment_organization_id.description: Pinned organization id, present only in single_tenant / pinned vpc deployments.

DeploymentMode.description: Deployment topology the control plane is running as.

DeploymentEnvironment.description: Named deployment environment used to select public product endpoints.

oauth_client_id.description: Registered public client id for the resource, when one is assigned.

password.description: The platform-staff user's account password, re-entered to prove a fresh presence.

access_token.description: An elevated first-party account-session token carrying a short-lived step-up claim.

expires_in.description: Seconds until the step-up elevation expires (60-900).

platform_step_up_exp.description: Unix expiry of the step-up elevation.

creditMicros.description: Positive integer number of credit micros to grant.

reference.description: Idempotency reference; replaying the same reference does not double-credit.

reason.description: Optional human-readable justification recorded on the ledger entry.

deduplicated.description: True when the reference matched a prior adjustment and no new credit was applied.

providerCostMicros.description: Staff-only: aggregate upstream provider cost across debits.

customerChargedMicros.description: Staff-only: aggregate credits debited from the customer.
